sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνατέλλω

- Transliteration: Anatello

- Phonetic: an-at-el'-lo

- Definition:

1. rise

a. to cause to rise

1. of the earth bring forth plants

b. to rise, arise, to rise from, be descended from

1. of sun moon and stars)

- Origin: from G303 and the base of G5056

- TDNT entry: 06:51,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and the base of G5056; to (cause to) arise: - (a- make to) rise at the rising of spring (up) be up.
